TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKFourByteTag extends System.ValueType implements class System.IEquatable`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag>

Docs.summary: Represents a four-byte OpenType/TrueType tag packed into a 32-bit unsigned integer.

.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(unsigned int32 value) cil managed

Docs.param: The packed tag value, where the most-significant byte holds the first character.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from a packed 32-bit value.

Docs.param: The first (most-significant) character of the tag.
The second character of the tag.
The third character of the tag.
The fourth (least-significant) character of the tag.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from four ASCII characters.

Docs.param: The string to parse. If or empty, the returned tag encodes zero.
Docs.summary: Parses a string into an , padding with spaces or truncating to exactly four characters.
Docs.returns: An representing the first four characters of , padded with spaces if shorter.

Docs.summary: Returns the string representation of this tag as four ASCII characters.
